specific_question: How many personalized vehicle recommendations did the Elexion Automotive CRM system generate in 2024?
answer: According to the sales and marketing department, Elexion Automotive's CRM system produced 50,000 customized vehicle recommendations in 2024.
dr_question: How could Elexion Automotive utilize Automotive Cloud's dealer performance management tools by early 2027 to strengthen relationships with its North American dealer network and, at the same time, maintain 90% of its direct-to-government sales channel?
